items.title: Jamie Dimon says markets underestimate risks and he wouldn't buy stocks or Treasurys at current prices
items.description: Comments from JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon contrast with investors' recent willingness to look past wars, tariffs and other shocks.

items.title: Jim Cramer says it's time to look beyond tech as AI uncertainty rattles the market
items.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer says the AI trade has become too unpredictable, making this a better time to put new money into high-quality companies outside of technology.

items.title: Trump imposing 50% tariffs on certain Canadian goods over alleged trade discrimination
items.description: Canada's relationship with the U.S. has frayed amid Trump's tariff-heavy agenda and vocal displeasure with the nations' trilateral trade pact with Mexico.

items.title: Trump says Netanyahu won't be arrested in New York, pushing back on Mamdani
items.description: Israel's prime minister, Benjamin Netanyahu, is the target of an arrest warrant issued by the International Criminal Court related to the war on Gaza.

items.title: Alphabet stock pops on report it's developing a more efficient AI chip
items.description: The new AI chip, called "Frozen v2," would embed parts of Gemini's architecture directly into the silicon, according to the report.

items.title: Trump administration's head of AI safety agency resigns after 3 months on job
items.description: Arvind Raman, the director of National Institute of Standards and Technology, will serve as acting director of CAISI, according to a spokesperson

items.title: Archer stock rips 20% higher as company unveils military craft with Anduril
items.description: Archer and its eVTOL peers are racing for FAA certification to start flying their air taxis commercially.

items.title: The FDA made a big reversal in its cyclosporiasis probe, but it still thinks iceberg lettuce is to blame
items.description: The FDA's investigation into the source of the cyclosporiasis outbreak is causing confusion as companies and consumers alike navigate new updates.

items.title: Here's our advice for investors looking to buy the dip in volatile AI stocks
items.description: When trading in a sector, industry, or stock changes dramatically, as it has with the hyperscalers and AI stocks in recent days, you must change your scales.

items.title: Paramount and Warner Bros. merger hit with temporary restraining order
items.description: A California judge granted a temporary restraining order as part of the lawsuit brought by state attorneys general due to antitrust concerns.

items.title: Oil prices rise after Trump says Iran will pay for killing U.S. service members
items.description: Oil prices have surged around 20% this month as fighting between the U.S. and Iran has sharply escalated.

items.title: Sen. Darline Graham running for full term to replace late brother Lindsey Graham
items.description: Sen. Darline Graham enters an increasingly crowded Republican field to fill the seat of her late brother Lindsey Graham, who died earlier this month.

items.title: JetBlue wins Spirit slots at LaGuardia Airport, eyes move to Marine Air Terminal as airlines fight for space
items.description: JetBlue Airways won takeoff and landing slots for up to 12 round-trip flights at LaGuardia Airport.

items.title: Could ‘The Odyssey’ lead the 'apes' back home to AMC shares?
items.description: AMC options surged out of the gate this morning with over 300,000 contracts traded as of writing.

items.title: Man with airsoft rifles caused fireworks explosion outside NYC immigration court: MS NOW
items.description: The FBI told CNBC that an individual set off "an incendiary device" outside 26 Federal Plaza, which contains a U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement office.

items.title: The bar for Tesla earnings is sky-high. Here's why and how options traders can capitalize
items.description: Michael Khouw breaks down how he's trading Tesla into earnings.

items.title: World Cup 2026 final in photos: Spain triumphs as football crowns a new champion
items.description: Spain reclaimed football's biggest prize on Sunday, defeating Argentina 1-0 after extra time in a tense World Cup final.

items.title: AMD launches Helios, its first rack AI system to rival Nvidia, adding Microsoft as newest buyer
items.description: AMD is taking aim at Nvidia with Helios, its first AI rack system, and has landed Microsoft as a new customer, joining Meta, OpenAI and Oracle.

items.title: What to know about testosterone replacement therapy as the U.S. military plans to test troops
items.description: While some research has shown benefits for patients who qualify, questions remain about the therapy's long-term risks and use among men without a medical need.

items.title: Iran's Houthi allies declare maritime embargo against Saudi Arabia, escalating threat to oil market
items.description: The militants, in a statement carried by state news, accused the Saudis of laying an "aggressive siege" against them.
